title: Test Resource Management Center
text:
The Test Resource Management Center (TRMC) is a DoW Field Activity that provides robust and flexible experimentation and testing capabilities to develop, acquire, field, and sustain reliable and effective weapon systems to meet current and future needs of the warfighter.
The Pentagon
Office of the Under Secretary of War,
Research and Engineering (OUSW(R&E))
3030 Defense Pentagon, Washington, DC 20301-3030
